title: Next-generation Skyblock
description: Next-generation Skyblock — a brand-new Skyblock adventure featuring a redesigned map and a wide variety of modern mods. Master the power of Sculk, build advanced machines with Create, bring your island to life using Naturalist, and decorate it with Another
body:
# 🌌 Next-generation Skyblock

A brand-new Skyblock adventure with a completely redesigned map and a mix of powerful, modern mods!
Master the Sculk energy, build advanced Create machines, and bring life to your island with Naturalist and Another Furniture.

## Featuring:
🌀 Sculk Horn & Sculk Expansion – mysterious sculk tech and dark energy.
⚙️ Create Fabric – automation and creativity combined.
🌿 Naturalist – realistic wildlife and nature.
🛋️ Another Furniture – stylish home decoration.
👥 Friends & Foes – new mobs, new challenges, new stories.

⚡ Build, automate, and evolve your island — the next generation of Skyblock starts here!
